use_cases: Decorative animated background for hero sections on landing pages
Ambient visual element for SaaS dashboards and web applications
Subtle animated backdrop for marketing websites and portfolios
Visual enhancement for full-width sections on product pages
ai_summary: An animated SVG background component featuring 36 floating bezier curve paths with continuous opacity and pathLength animations. Uses Framer Motion for smooth, linear animations that create a subtle floating effect. Works as a decorative wrapper component that can contain any children while providing an ambient animated backdrop suitable for hero sections or full-page backgrounds.
